localmaxxingRecordedFields.notes: Quality-cleared Qwen3.6-27B Q4_0 GGUF on 3x Arc Pro B70. Full-logit deterministic repeat passed for 16 greedy decode steps. Key flags: ASYNC_CPY_TENSOR=0, COMM_SINGLE_KERNEL=1, COMM_SYNC_AFTER=1, FUSE_MMVQ2=1. No power-limit/overclock changes.

apiNotes: Initial POST failed with 400 because LocalMaxxing rejects GGUF distribution repositories and requested base hfId unsloth/Qwen3.6-27B.
Full detailed payload with the corrected hfId returned 500 Internal Server Error.
A compact required-field payload succeeded first as cmotmnnm6000aqu01uzb9wk12 but lacked context/notes.
A second payload with prompt/output/context/notes but no engineFlags succeeded as the listed benchmark ID.
Need retry engineFlags after the 5 minute POST rate window to isolate which engineFlags key causes the server error.
